titleStmt.title: SII 31.82: original edition by C. A. Padmanabha Sastri and T. S. Ravishankar
No. 82. (A.R. No. B 206 of 1938.) CHIḌIPĪRĀLA, KAMALAPURAM TALUK, CUDDAPAH DISTRICT.

summary.p: It is dated in Śaka 1464, Śubhakṛit, Āshāḍha, śu. 11, corresponding to June 23, Friday 1542 A.D.

Registers the gift of grāma kaṭam which is suppose to be collected from various taxes of the village Chapili for maintaining the akhaṇḍa tiruvaḷi in the temple of Agastyēśvaraswāmi by the Mallaya, the son of Parvatarāju of Kāśyapa gōtra and Yajuśākha. Vōbulaya and Yallaya of Ghaṇḍikātasima. The said taxes include Maggastāvāras (taxes on looms), kōmaṭi siddhāya (tax collected from the merchants) gāṇduga siddhāya (tax from the oil mill, peṁdilisiddhāya (tax collected at the time of marriage), Iḍigi siddhāya (tax on toddy tappers), golla-siddhāya (tax on cowshepherds), Vuppu-siddhāya (tax on salt).

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . svastiśrī Agastiśvarāyanamaḥ . svastiśrī . jayābhyudaya śālivāhana śakavarṣaṁbulu 1464 Agunēṭi
śubhakṛtusaṁvatsara Āṣāḍha su(śu) 11 lu śrīmanmahārājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara śrīvīrapratāpa śrīAcyuta
dēvamahārāyalu pṛdhivīrājyaṁbusēyucuṁḍagānu śrīAgastīśvaruni divyaśrīpādapadmaṁbulku ghaṁḍikōṭa sīma
suṁkalu kāsya(śya)pa gōtraṁ yajuśmākhādhyā yulaina parvatarāja komārūṁḍu mallayānu
komāruṁḍu vōbalayānu cittalūri komāruṁḍu mallayānu jatannu Ānaṁ
tamulaina daṁḍumulu samarpiṁci Iccina dharmaśāsanaṁ . svāmi saṁnidhini Akhaṁḍa tiruvaḷiki vuṁḍēṭi Aṁdulagu kaṭṭaḍa . ghaṁḍikōṭa
sīmalōna māsuṁkaruṇyanku cellē cadupu nēlanu māsuṁkhānku cellē capili grāma kaṭnamun maggastāvarālun koṁmaṭi siddhāyaṁ gāndu
ga sidhāyaṁ peṁḍilisidhāyaṁ Iḍigi sidhāyaṁ gollasidhāyaṁ vuppusidhāyaṁ sahāgānu tadhātidhipuṇyakālamaṁdu
jatanu trivācakaṁgānu trikaraṇasu(si)ddhiṁgānu tadhātidhi puṇyakālamaṁdu dhāravōsi Istimi yīdharṁmmaṁ Ā
caṁdrārkastāIgānu svāmisannidhini tiruvaḷake puṁḍi Ā gānu jatinu trivācakaṁ gānu trikaraṇasuddhigānu Istimi yī dharma
nku yavvaru vakriṁcinānu vāru gaṁgakartta gōvubrāṁhaninni vāraṇāsi lōna tamatalli taṁḍri ni vadhiṁcina pāpāna pōvuvāru .
Aṭaniccina dharmmaśāsanaṁ . ślōkaṁ . svadattāṁ paradattāṁ vā yō harēti vasuṁdharāṁ ṣaṣṭhirvarṣa sahasrāṇi vipāyā�
jyāyatēkrimiḥ .
Digital edition of SII 31.82 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
